Interface ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution

ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution.ResultProcessingExecution

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final class 
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution.ResultProcessingConverter
    A Converter to post-process all source objects using the given ResultProcessor.
    static final class 
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution.ResultProcessingExecution
    An ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution that wraps the results of the given delegate with the given result processing.
